# Version 4.148.0
> **First stable v4 release** · Released June 22, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.148.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v4.148.0)
> **Supersedes [4.147.0](4.147.0.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.148.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.148.0 is the first stable v4 release, built on Skia m148 with a reworked singleton lifecycle. It carries everything from the 4.147 preview line — variable fonts, animated WebP encoding, SKSamplingOptions on surface draws — plus a rework of the singleton lifecycle, pixel-span fixes for SKPixmap/SKBitmap, and the promotion of long-obsolete SKPaint text/font members to compile errors. This is a breaking release — read the migration notes below before upgrading.

## Breaking Changes

- **Legacy SKPaint text and font members are now compile errors** — The paint text/font state members that were marked `[Obsolete]` in v3 are now errors, and the remaining pre-v4 obsoletes have been trimmed from the reference assembly. Move typeface, text size, hinting and text encoding onto `SKFont` (paired with the `SKCanvas.DrawText(..., SKFont, SKPaint)` overloads) before upgrading. ([#4068](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4068), [#4114](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4114), [#4205](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4205))
- **GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo renamed to GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo** — The Vulkan YCbCr conversion info struct now follows the SkiaSharp `GR` casing convention. Update any reference and rebuild — the old name and its IEquatable/Equals/== operators are gone.
- **SKNativeObject.IgnorePublicDispose is now read-only** — The `IgnorePublicDispose` property loses its protected setter — subclasses can no longer flip it at runtime. Set the value from the constructor path instead. ([#4080](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4080))
- **Singleton lifecycle rework** — Process-wide singletons (default typefaces, font managers, ambient contexts) now have a documented lifecycle owned by the managed layer instead of ad-hoc native pinning. Consumers that were relying on singletons never being finalized should audit their disposal patterns. ([#4080](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4080))
- **Assembly version bumped to 4.x** — SkiaSharp.dll now reports assembly version 4.148.0.0 (up from 3.119.0.0). Consumers with strong-name binding redirects or hard-coded version checks must be updated. Review the linked API-diff report before upgrading.

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m148** — The bundled engine moves from m132 through m147 and lands on m148, folding in two upstream chrome/m147 bug-fix sync merges along the way. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3560](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3560), [#3660](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3660), [#3702](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3702), [#4044](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4044), [#4081](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4081), [#4125](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4125))
- **Variable fonts and color font palettes** — Variable font support wires through SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp, and SKFont/SKTypeface gain color font palette selection and hardened variable-font handling. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3703](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3703), [#3742](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3742))
- **Managed default typeface resolution** — Default typeface lookup moves to the managed layer (fixing #3693), and the Skia shim regains `sk_fontmgr_legacy_create_typeface` so downstream code depending on the legacy factory works again. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3730](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3730), [#3744](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3744))

## API Surface

- **SKSamplingOptions on SKSurface.Draw and SKCanvas.DrawSurface** — New overloads accept SKSamplingOptions so callers can pick the mipmap and filter mode for surface-to-surface draws. ([#3491](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3491))
- **SKStream.GetData() for zero-copy conversion** — Turn any seekable stream into an SKData without an intermediate byte[] copy. ([#3772](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3772))
- **Animated WebP encoding** — SKWebpEncoder can now emit animated WebP files from a frame sequence, closing a long-standing gap next to the existing decoder. ([#3771](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3771))
- **HBColor struct and missing HarfBuzz wrappers** — HarfBuzzSharp gets a proper `HBColor` struct matching `hb_color_t` and fills in wrappers that had been missing or mis-named. ([#4000](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4000), [#4001](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4001))

## Bug Fixes

- **SKPixmap/SKBitmap pixel span uses row bytes and correct axis** — `GetPixelSpan` now honours `RowBytes` for stride, and `GetPixelSpan<T>(x, y)` computes the row offset from `Width` instead of `Height` — pixels read from non-tight bitmaps are now correct. ([#4128](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4128), [#4148](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4148))
- **SKPath finalizer crash when SKPathBuilder collected first** — A GC ordering bug that could crash on finalization when an SKPathBuilder was collected before the SKPath it produced is fixed. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3796](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3796))
- **Android SKGLView blank after MAUI TabBar switch** — Switching tabs in a MAUI TabBar no longer leaves SKGLView blank; the GL surface is now correctly re-attached after the view is re-added to the tree. — ❤️ [@SimonvBez](https://github.com/SimonvBez) ([#3076](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3076))
- **WinUI Projection DLL not found on .NET 9** — The WinUI Projection assembly is now packaged so .NET 9 consumers can load it without a `DllNotFoundException` at startup. ([#4084](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4084))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Singleton lifecycle reworked** — Process-wide singletons now have a documented lifecycle owned by the managed layer; disposal and finalization order are predictable across the object graph. See the breaking-changes note above. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4080](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4080))
- **Native-compat gate moved to SkiaApi cctor** — The native-library compat check moves off `[ModuleInitializer]` onto the SkiaApi type constructor, running on first API use instead of at module load — this avoids AOT/trim edge cases and makes startup failures easier to diagnose. ([#4133](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4133))

## Platform

- **Tizen x64/arm64 and Linux Bionic** — Tizen picks up 64-bit native builds and Android-hosted Linux (`linux-bionic`) becomes a first-class native target. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3620), [#3217](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3217))
- **Apple TFM alignment** — Libraries target the versioned Apple TFMs (26.0) while sample apps use the unversioned ones, matching current .NET SDK guidance. ([#3798](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3798))
- **WASM drops pre-.NET 8 Emscripten builds** — .NET 8 is now the floor for the SkiaSharp WASM runtime asset; older Emscripten native slices are removed. ([#4022](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4022))

## Security

- **Bundled native dependencies refreshed** — libexpat 2.8.1, libpng 1.6.58, zlib 1.3.2.1-motley, freetype 2.14.3, libjpeg-turbo 3.1.4.1 and harfbuzz 14.2.0 all pick up their latest upstream security and bug fixes. ([#3717](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3717), [#3718](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3718), [#3720](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3720), [#3726](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3726), [#4012](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4012), [#4035](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4035), [#4079](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4079))

## Release Candidate 1 (June 12, 2026)

The release candidate landed the Skia m148 bump, the singleton lifecycle rework, the SKPaint text/font obsolete-to-error promotion, the SKPixmap/SKBitmap pixel-span fixes, the WinUI Projection DLL fix for .NET 9, and expat 2.8.1.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.147.0-preview.3.1...v4.148.0-rc.1.2)

## Preview 3 (May 24, 2026)

Preview 3 finished the API pass with HBColor and missing HarfBuzz wrappers, dropped native WASM builds for pre-.NET 8 Emscripten, and picked up freetype, zlib and libjpeg-turbo refreshes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.147.0-preview.2.1...v4.147.0-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (May 6, 2026)

Preview 2 added animated WebP encoding, zero-copy `SKStream.GetData()`, the SKPath finalizer crash fix, and the Apple TFM realignment.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.147.0-preview.1.1...v4.147.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (April 28, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the v4 line: Skia m132 → m133 → m147, variable fonts, color font palettes, SKSamplingOptions on surface draws, the managed default-typeface fix, Tizen x64/arm64, Linux Bionic, and dependency refreshes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.4...v4.147.0-preview.1.1)
